iOS / Android / Frontend Engineer

Cheng Keying

I build user-focused apps and polished interfaces, with an emphasis on clear architecture, performance, and maintainable systems.

Featured work

A few examples of products, systems, and interfaces built with long-term maintainability in mind.

Astro Portfolio Site

A lightweight portfolio and content site built for fast loading, simple maintenance, and clean component reuse.

Mobile Design System

A reusable design system for mobile products with a strong focus on consistency, performance, and team-wide adoption.

Message Filter Tool

A productivity tool that helps users distinguish important messages from noisy streams through visual hierarchy and filtering rules.

Core capabilities

A practical set of engineering capabilities for shipping clear, maintainable products.

Mobile architecture

iOS, Android, UI architecture, design systems, and product delivery.

Frontend systems

Astro, TypeScript, reusable sections, fast static delivery, and deployment workflow.
